changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.comment: Align pre-import FILE preview/review TransactionIngestion statuses with readiness semantics. CSV Confirm Import does not exist yet, so existing FILE COMPLETED/PARTIALLY_COMPLETED rows represent preview/review readiness rather than actual import results.
changeSet.sql: UPDATE transaction_ingestion SET status = 'READY' WHERE ingestion_type = 'FILE' AND status = 'COMPLETED' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM file_ingestion fi WHERE fi.transaction_ingestion_id = transaction_ingestion.id );

UPDATE transaction_ingestion SET status = 'PARTIALLY_READY' WHERE ingestion_type = 'FILE' AND status = 'PARTIALLY_COMPLETED' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM file_ingestion fi WHERE fi.transaction_ingestion_id = transaction_ingestion.id );
